settings.text: Prep meals tailored to your goals. Delivered fresh
Meals crafted by a trainer who knows what it takes, cooked to fuel strength, recovery and results. Built for performance, taste tested by athletes.
Caribbean Jerk Chicken with Veg Fried Rice
Honey BBQ Chicken, Potatoes and Green Beans

Delivered fresh every Monday & Thursday.
No shortcuts. Just results.
We take pride in preparing our food with the upmost care.
A local meal prep service with heart. We deliver personally not via third party drivers.
Every portion crafted for balanced carbs, proteins, and fats tuned to support your grind.
"Meal prep so good I almost cried when I finished my last box."
Everything was portioned perfectly and somehow tasted better after a few days in the fridge?? My microwave thinks it’s a chef now. 10/10 would recommend even my cat tried to steal a bite.
"Finally, food that supports my training without sacrificing quality."

As a full time PT and athlete, I need meals that fuel performance and recovery. PTPREPS nails it clean ingredients, proper macros, and no bloat. The attention to detail and care in prep shows in every bite.
"It’s like having a personal chef without the faff."

Between work and training, I’ve tried loads of meal prep services. PTPREPS stands out because it’s not just fuel it’s food you look forward to. The variety, flavour, and convenience make it a weekly non negotiable for me.
Our goal is for every customer to be totally satisfied with their purchase. If this isn’t the case, let us know and we’ll do our best to work with you to make it right.

You choose your delivery schedule - Monday, Thursday or both ( for a full week of meals ). Meals are freshly prepared and delivered weekly on your chosen days. Subscriptions are billed monthly and you can pause or cancel any time.

settings.heading: When will I get my order?

settings.text: We will work quickly to ship your order as soon as possible. Once your order has shipped, you will receive an email with further information. Delivery times vary depending on your location.

Yes, all the meals are freezer friendly. For the best taste and freshness, we recommend freezing them as soon as possible if you don't plan to eat them within a few days. Just defrost overnight in the fridge before reheating.
Shipping is calculated based on your location and the items in your order. You will always know the shipping price before you purchase.
